nasb.text: Then the commanders of the Philistines went out to battle, and it happened as often as they went out, that David behaved himself more wisely than all the servants of Saul. So his name was highly esteemed.

esv.text: Then the commanders of the Philistines came out to battle, and as often as they came out David had more success than all the servants of Saul, so that his name was highly esteemed.

cnv.text: 非利士人的領袖常常出征，每逢他們出征，大衛作事都比掃羅所有的臣僕所作的更亨通，所以他的名字極為人尊重。

ccb.text: 非利士人的将领常来进犯，大卫每次作战总比扫罗的其他臣仆出色，因而倍受尊重。
